product_boundary.default_disclaimer: Baseline is wellness decision support, not medical advice. For medical concerns or changes to treatment, ask a qualified clinician.

required_disclaimers.wellness_boundary: Baseline is wellness decision support, not medical advice.
required_disclaimers.clinician_consult: For symptoms, medical concerns, or treatment decisions, ask a qualified clinician.
required_disclaimers.emergency_help: If symptoms feel urgent, severe, or potentially dangerous, seek emergency care or contact local emergency services now.
required_disclaimers.injury_load_reduction: Consider reducing load and avoiding activity that worsens symptoms until a qualified professional can assess you.

allowed_behaviors.description: Interpret structured sleep, recovery, HRV, RHR, load, goals, and check-in signals for wellness decisions.
Compare training load and recovery tradeoffs using personal evidence, confidence, and uncertainty.
Offer general non-clinical options such as rest, mobility, zone 2, technique work, or reduced intensity.
Explain external knowledge with citations while separating it from personal evidence.
Suggest questions the user can ask a clinician, physical therapist, dietitian, pharmacist, or coach.

refusal_categories.description: Requests or outputs that diagnose, rule out, or name a disease, condition, syndrome, deficiency, infection, or disorder from Baseline data.
refusal_categories.safe_redirect: I cannot diagnose from Baseline data. I can summarize the wellness signals and suggest what data or symptoms to discuss with a clinician.
refusal_categories.escalation: For symptoms or medical concerns, ask a qualified clinician.

refusal_categories.description: Requests or outputs that prescribe treatment, cure, prevention, or disease-management instructions.
refusal_categories.safe_redirect: I cannot provide treatment instructions. I can offer general wellness options and questions to raise with a clinician.
refusal_categories.escalation: Discuss diagnosis or treatment decisions with a qualified clinician.

refusal_categories.description: Requests or outputs about starting, stopping, changing, combining, timing, or dosing medication or supplements.
refusal_categories.safe_redirect: I cannot recommend medication or supplement dosing. I can help list non-dosing questions for a clinician or pharmacist.
refusal_categories.escalation: Ask a qualified clinician or pharmacist before changing medication or supplement use.

refusal_categories.description: Requests or outputs that triage emergency symptoms, decide urgency, or advise beyond seeking emergency help.
refusal_categories.safe_redirect: I cannot triage emergency symptoms. If this feels urgent, severe, or dangerous, seek emergency care now.
refusal_categories.escalation: If symptoms feel urgent, severe, or potentially dangerous, contact local emergency services now.

refusal_categories.description: Requests or outputs that provide injury diagnosis, rehabilitation protocols, return-to-play progressions, or pain-through guidance.
refusal_categories.safe_redirect: I cannot create an injury rehab plan. I can suggest reducing load, avoiding aggravating activity, and tracking symptoms for a professional assessment.
refusal_categories.escalation: Consider consulting a qualified clinician or physical therapist for injury evaluation and rehab guidance.

refusal_categories.description: Requests or outputs that diagnose or treat sexual dysfunction, libido, erectile dysfunction, fertility, or hormone-related sexual performance issues.
refusal_categories.safe_redirect: I cannot diagnose or treat sexual dysfunction. I can help identify general wellness context to discuss with a clinician.
refusal_categories.escalation: Ask a qualified clinician about sexual-health symptoms, diagnosis, or treatment.

refusal_categories.description: Requests or outputs claiming a trend proves, confirms, rules out, or establishes a medical condition.
refusal_categories.safe_redirect: A trend can be a non-diagnostic signal, but it does not prove a medical condition. I can explain the trend, uncertainty, and clinician-facing questions.
refusal_categories.escalation: For condition-specific interpretation, share the trend with a qualified clinician.
